_comment: Symbol dimensions calibrated from 26 DWG files (libredwg dwg2dxf conversion). Block definitions + inline entity analysis.
_source: 26 DWG samples: 32A~500A Single Phase DB & TPN SLDs - ezdxf block/entity extraction (2026-03-02)

_proportions.RCCB_block: same as MCCB + rcd_h=0.4298*arc_r, rcd_v=0.7777*arc_r, 18 blocks

MCB.description: Miniature Circuit Breaker (<100A) — 151.4deg arc from DWG inline entities

MCCB.description: Moulded Case Circuit Breaker (100A-630A) — 125.8deg arc from DWG block definitions

ACB.description: Air Circuit Breaker (>630A) with horizontal crossbar — same arc as MCCB

RCCB.description: Residual Current Circuit Breaker — 125.8deg arc + RCD bar from DWG blocks

ELCB.description: Earth Leakage Circuit Breaker (same symbol as RCCB)

KWH_METER.description: kWh Energy Meter — rectangle w/h=2.0 from DWG polylines

ISOLATOR.description: Isolator / Disconnect Switch — DP ISOL block: rectangle + L-stem

EARTH.description: Earth / Ground Symbol (3 decreasing horizontal lines)
